title: Deliciously Crunchy French Nuka Pickle Quiche
description: A festive French dish featuring ground clove and nuka-pickle, perfect for a special occasion. This quiche is a delicious blend of briny and crunchy flavors.
instructions: Roll out the pie crust and place it in a tart pan with a removable bottom.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, heavy cream, ground clove, salt, and black pepper.
Add the diced nuka pickle, grated cheese, and chopped parsley to the bowl and stir to combine.
Pour the egg mixture into the pie crust.
Bake the quiche for 35 minutes or until the edges are golden brown.
Remove the quiche from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes.
Serve the quiche warm, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
Note: this recipe is for refrigerator pickling/preserving only — store in the refrigerator and consume within 1 week. Do not water-bath can without an acid (vinegar or lemon juice).
